visual_findings.finding: The previous oval skin-patch boundary is greatly reduced, but mouth_base_clean still leaves the original source mouth line visible.
Clean socket and underpaint overlays still look like smeared/inpainted patches around hair, eyelids, and skin, not clean Cubism-ready sockets.
Strict mouth expression alpha filtering removes much of the round patch edge, but some expression detail quality remains rough.

decision: Do not proceed to Mini Cubism diagnostic preview from this candidate. Keep source_front and character style, but regenerate clean-base assets with model-native/edit-based inpainting or manual repaint before another overlay QA gate.
